value_chain_position: Credit-scoring analytics and decisioning software platform — occupies the market-data-and-analytics layer of fintech rails, providing a near-mandatory toll (the FICO score) on virtually every US consumer credit origination.
relative_comps: FICO is among the highest-load-bearing names in the entire screener — the FICO score is embedded in GSE mortgage standards, bank underwriting policies and regulatory frameworks in a way that makes true substitution decade-long. 13% 3-year CAGR and 23% YoY reflect pricing power on score royalties rather than volume growth. FCF margin of 40% is exceptional. Vs. Equifax/TransUnion, FICO sits above them as the scoring standard that consumes their bureau data. The broadening s-curve reflects near-saturated US consumer-credit penetration; international and FICO Platform software are the growth vectors. Defense_tech and robotics hints stripped — pure fintech toll-taker.
